report.project_summary:
This rectangular floor plan contains 3 rooms with a total area of 189.7 square meters. The structural analysis identified 15 load-bearing walls and 36 partition walls.

The overall structural integrity score is 0% with 3 critical issues and 22 warnings requiring attention. The maximum span of 702.0m requires intermediate support.

The estimated construction cost is ₹2,118,501 (₹11,165/sqm), representing a potential savings of ₹259,774 compared to premium material options.

element_explanations.recommendation_text: RCC is recommended for this partition due to its optimal balance of cost (₹1800.0/sqm) and structural properties (30.0 MPa strength).
element_explanations.tradeoff_summary: Score: 0.46. Key factors: Exterior wall - weather exposure, Part of continuous load path

optimization_suggestions.title: Living Room too small
optimization_suggestions.description: Living Room is 0.6 sqm, below recommended minimum of 12.0 sqm for a living

optimization_suggestions.title: High partition wall count
optimization_suggestions.description: Floor plan has 36 partition walls vs 15 load-bearing. Consider open-plan layout to reduce costs.

optimization_suggestions.title: Beam opportunity for large spans
optimization_suggestions.description: 3 rooms have spans over 4.5m. Adding beams could allow lighter/cheaper wall materials.

report.overall_assessment:
Based on the comprehensive analysis, this floor plan demonstrates acceptable structural integrity. Professional structural engineering review is recommended before construction.

Key recommendations: Address the 22 identified warnings, consider the 3 optimization suggestions for potential cost savings, and ensure proper material specifications during construction.
report.methodology_notes: Analysis performed using VLM+CV fusion parsing, graph-based geometry analysis, and multi-criteria material optimization. (Mock mode - LLM explanations disabled)
limitations: Scale detection accuracy depends on image quality
Regional material cost variations not accounted for
Professional structural review recommended for construction
